creator: lew@mmasia.com
text:
Mitsumi FX800 mcd0:timeout getting status mcd0: at 0x300 not found.
During bring up of BSD2.1.7.  Tried all the other IRQ's via changing
the configuration: 14 (Primary IRQ), 1f0 (address)
                   etc...
Made modifications to the config via "-c" on boot and made sure
no lines were in conflict.
Also wdc0 and wdc1 are on with their defaults settings

Fix: 

none.
How-To-Repeat: always repeatable not able to see my cd-rom drive when 
doing a /stand/sysinstall procedure.
